commands.cmd:
raw=$(curl -fsS --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:6060/debug/pprof/heap?debug=1" 2>/dev/null) || exit 1
inuse=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | awk '/^# HeapInuse = / { print $4; exit }')
[ -n "$inuse" ] || exit 1
alloc=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | awk '/^# HeapAlloc = / { print $4; exit }')
if [ -n "$alloc" ]; then
  printf '{"heap_inuse_bytes":%s,"heap_alloc_bytes":%s}' "$inuse" "$alloc"
else
  printf '{"heap_inuse_bytes":%s}' "$inuse"
fi
